visibleText: Bok Choy - Stardew Valley Wiki Bok Choy From Stardew Valley Wiki Jump to navigation Jump to search Bok Choy The leafy greens and fibrous stalks are healthy and delicious. Recipes Image Name Description Ingredients Energy / Health Buff(s) Buff Duration Recipe Source(s) Sell Price Super Meal It's a really energizing meal. Bok Choy (1) Cranberries (1) Artichoke (1) 160 72 Max Energy (+40) Speed (+1) 3m 30s Kent (Mail - 7+ ) data-sort-value="220"> 220g Tailoring Bok Choy is used in the spool of the Sewing Machine with Cloth in the feed to create a dyeable Button Down Shirt . It is a green dye when used in the spool of the Sewing Machine with a dyeable clothing item in the feed. It can be placed in the green dye pot at Emily's and Haley's house for use in dyeing . Quests Bok Choy may be randomly requested in Fall at the "Help Wanted" board outside Pierre's General Store for a reward of data-sort-value="240"> 240g and 150 Friendship points. History 1.4 : Can now be used in Tailoring . 1.5 : Iridium quality is now possible when using Deluxe Fertilizer .
